reviews.review_description: Well it’s life changing for me. ￼I am 44 and in the middle of perimenopause. I also have ADHD and pretty significant anxiety issues. I have been battling with my weight since I was a teenager. ￼ I tried to exercise in public in the past, only to have guys from their vehicles moo and oink at me as they drive by while I’m jogging.   So needless to say, I stopped exercising in public.  ￼￼ I got married and had kids and then exercise was put on the back burner and I gained so much more weight. I recently purchased a Meta quest three mainly just for fun, but then I found fun fit land and coach Mike.  I can close my bedroom door and commit time just to myself uninterrupted. I love the dance music in combat fit. It’s so fun that I wanna keep doing it. I hate that I have to take breaks and do it every other day just to avoid getting sore. ￼ I have stopped focusing on how much weight I can lose and started focusing on how much movement I can do. Since I started doing this a couple weeks ago, I have gained so much more movement and flexibility. When I first started, my squats hurt my knees so much and now I have absolutely no problem doing it. ￼ thank you for this. ￼

developer_response.body:
Hi Tiff33,

Thank you for sharing something so personal and powerful with us. Reading your story truly moved us. We’re incredibly honored that FunFitLand can now be part of a safe, private space where you can move freely, confidently, and on your own terms. 💛

The shift you described—from focusing on weight loss to focusing on movement—is amazing. Gaining flexibility, improving your squats, feeling stronger, and actually wanting to come back because CombatFit is fun? That’s real transformation. We’re so proud of you for prioritizing yourself. That’s strength in every sense of the word.

Thank you for trusting us to be part of your path. Keep going, and we’re cheering for you every step of the way.

With appreciation,
The FunFitLand Crew 💜🎮🔥

reviews.review_description: Being 54, I am looking for fun ways to keep my activities up and mix up my treadmill and weight routine. What I like about FFL is they are continually adding and expanding. So what you see is not what you get, your continually getting more as they keep mixing things up. Since I joined last year I see a group that is constantly adding new and Interesting workout routines. I love working out with their little mascot and I like they are adding long and short workouts. They even added walking workouts. You can dance, you can walk, and you can punch. The music is the only hit or miss for me. I wish all these apps found a way to let me play my Spotify playlists with their workouts. One last positive, I have limited space so the fact I can keep the portals straight ahead and to my left and right is very helpful.

developer_response.body:
Hi SlothyMcSloth,

Thank you for your wonderful review! We’re so happy FunFitLand is helping you keep your routine fresh. It’s also great to hear that Sparky has made your sessions more enjoyable.

We appreciate your feedback on the music and Spotify playlist option, and we’ll share it with our team. Please keep sharing your experiences on our community page, and spread the word about FunFitLand!

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 💪🎶🌟

reviews.review_description: Great app! It’s motivating, well-crafted, dynamic, yet has a clean design—and the nature photos are wonderful. Not needing a controller is a huge plus; it's great not having to hold onto a sweaty device during a workout. If I could suggest one improvement, it would be adding some period/era-specific music tracks—only those with a tempo that matches a workout, of course. Other than that, it’s a solid 5 stars!

developer_response.body:
Hi tomywatt,

Thank you so much for the fantastic 5-star review! We’re thrilled that FunFitLand feels motivating, dynamic, and clean to use, and we’re especially happy you’re enjoying hand tracking.

Your suggestion for music is a great idea, and we’ll share it with the team. We’d love for you to share your experience on our community page and spread the word about FunFitLand!

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 💪🌿🎶

reviews.review_description:
This App makes working out a JOY. Unbelievably realistic, ever-changing visuals ensure your mind is constantly distracted from fatigue and instead immersed in this beautiful world. The range of motion gives you an actual whole body workout. And Coach Mike should run for president. Some of his workouts are like therapy on steroids.

I'm absolutely hooked.

developer_response.body:
Hi PreethiBx,

Thank you for the amazing 5-star review! We’re so happy FunFitLand is making workouts feel joyful.

We’re thrilled you’re hooked. Please feel free to share your experience on our community page and spread the word to anyone who could use a workout that feels this good.

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🌍💪✨

reviews.review_description:
Coach Alice is fabulous! Her workouts are super cardio-focused, they slim you down without building too much muscle — I love it! 💪✨
Coach Mike is amazing too, guaranteed rock-solid glutes. 🍑🔥
Thank you! I’m a huge fan, and my mind absolutely loves it too!

developer_response.body:
Hi LaurieForReal,

Thank you so much for the 5 stars! It means a lot to know FunFitLand is making both your body and mind feel great!

We’d love for you to share your experience on our community page and spread the word with fellow fitness fans.

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 💪✨🍑

reviews.review_description: I am obsessed with this game and the variety of the workouts! I had fitXR for an year, just recently cancelled it and subscribed to FunFitLand. What  really stood out for me are the core, leg workouts and how creative dancing moves are. Even if I do not feel like working out I am always able to find something fun to make me move - walking and side step are my favourite ! Could you please consider adding some more of walking and side step ? Thank you❤️

developer_response.body:
Hi Mdushek,

Thank you so much for the amazing 5-star review! We’re thrilled to hear you’re loving the variety.

We really appreciate your request for more walking and side step workouts. We’ll share this with the team as we continue building new content. We’d also love for you to share your favorites on our community page and spread the word about FunFitLand!

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 💪🎶❤️

reviews.review_description: I have installed plenty of fitness apps, including the famous saber ones, and this one keeps being my baseline. Amazing app! I wish they had more diversity of scenery, but overall both the exercises and the teachers are great. Amazing app. Got my heartbeat up in a very easy way.

developer_response.body:
Hi CosmicStingray6886,

Thank you so much for your amazing review!

We also appreciate your note about wanting more diversity in scenery. Feedback like this really helps us as we continue improving and expanding the FunFitLand experience.

Thanks again for your support. We’d love for you to share more of your journey on our community page and help spread the word about FunFitLand!

Best, The FunFitLand Crew 🎮💪✨

reviews.review_description:
I love the app and compared to others I find it has 
better coaching styles and environments. 
Please add more flow workouts, these are underrated!

developer_response.body:
Hi PunchyOrca3788,

Thank you so much for the 5 stars! We’re thrilled to hear you love FunFitLand and that the coaching styles and environments stand out for you.

We also appreciate the request for more flow workouts — great feedback, and we’ll share it with the team. Please feel free to share your experience on the community page and spread the word!

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 💪🌟🎉

reviews.review_title: Amazing workout app but having an issue
reviews.review_description:
I am testing Funfitland and is indeed very fun and challenging workout app and I am really thinking to pay the subscription even when I am not much on the boat to pay subscriptions 

But I am having one issue, on my first days I tried to cancel my subscription to not be charged at the end of subscription and I receive an offering for 1 month extension to keep using it... Thanks to this I continue using the app daily but today once is finishing the first week of trial and it suppose to continue with the month free, that is mentioned on the subscription page that my 1 month free will start at May 1st, but even with that the application is trying to charge the month anyway today...

Can you help to check on that? Thanks in advance

Edit: Thanks a lot to FunFitLand Team for your quick help and response in FB and here, after around 3 weeks of usage I am very engaged with this applications and enjoying the variety of exercises, also is great how almost every week we have more and new exercises so it make it worth the subscription business model

Give a try, if you like this Fit applications you will enjoy it, 5 stars

developer_response.body:
Hi efrenventura,

Thank you so much for the 4-star review! We’re really happy to hear FunFitLand feels fun, challenging, and motivating for your daily workouts.

About the 1-month extension: this should be part of Meta’s subscription cancellation-retention offer. It is usually added to your subscription after the first paid billing is successfully completed, rather than extending the free trial period itself. That may be why Meta is still attempting the monthly charge when the trial ends. Please check your Meta subscription details, and if anything still looks incorrect, please send us a screenshot at hello@funfitland.com so we can help look into it.

We truly appreciate you giving FunFitLand a chance!

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 💪🎮✨

reviews.review_title: The absolute most fun VR workout 🥳
reviews.review_description:
I have tested many VR fitness apps, and FunFitLand is by far the most fun! There is a huge variety of exercises, themes, and backgrounds, which makes working out feel like absolute play. It’s an amazing and intense way to burn calories, build muscle, and really engage the core without ever getting bored.

I initially experienced some tracking issues (environment drift) while playing. However, the customer support I received was world-class. They took my problem seriously from the very first message and were incredibly eager to help me troubleshoot. A massive thank you to Aris from the crew for the outstanding communication and dedication!

Highly recommended, both for the incredibly fun gameplay and for a developer team that truly listens to and cares about its players!

developer_response.body:
Hi dangund86,

Thank you so much for this incredible 5-star review!

We truly appreciate your kind words about our support team. It means a lot to know that our team was able to help you through the tracking issue and make you feel supported every step of the way. Feedback like yours motivates us to keep improving for our players every day.

Thank you again for the recommendation! We would love to see more of your FunFitLand journey on our community page, and we hope you keep spreading the word to fellow VR fitness fans.

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🎮💪🥳

reviews.review_description: This app has really changed my daily life. (I'll be turning a 1/2 century this year) I have fibromyalgia and it can really stop people who have this in their tracks. However, since I've been using FFL I can feel a change in every aspect, including brain fog, which is great. Admittedly, I have to take a break from time to time but when I'm well again I jump straight back in. I love the Dasha sessions, they are fun, funny and give the motivation I need for when I'm in the need of a kick up the backside. I combine this with yoga and pilates and I cannot recommend this app enough if you want to lose weight, feel agile, be flexible and feel mentally stimulated. Thank you to the whole team.

This app helped me get back into shape in a fun way, so I would stay consistent!! Definitely love this!! Only downside is that it glitches sometime. Like 1 of your controllers would stop working and it has battery power. Or the game itself messes up and ppl like me that strive to always get 100% pissess me off. Need more energetic music. Rock sucks.

reviews.review_title: I think you rescue my health.
reviews.review_description:
After COVID, it was very hard for me to start training again. I tried a couple of times, but it didn’t last. I should mention that before COVID, I was working out 3–4 hours a day. Now, thanks to your app, I can get back on track, it’s part of my daily routine, along with other exercises. It’s fun, it gives me measurable goals, and I just love it.

Btw… I need a stronger workout than the 61-minute intense “Let Out the Beast 3.” I also have a couple of ideas to make the app even better. If you’re interested, please hit me up.

Wow – I love FunFitLand so much that it makes me write my first review ever here 😎.
When I got my Meta Quest, I tried many workout apps, but this one is by far the best! The instructors are fantastic and incredibly motivating. The music is great, the scenery is stunning and there are so many different workouts and environments that it never gets boring.
I actually look forward to working out every evening (fastest way to close those Apple Watch rings!) and getting cheered up (especially by Mike - thank you for all the positivity 🙏🏻).
In terms of value for money, this app is unbeatable - if you’re going to choose just one workout app, make it this one! I’m honestly trying to think of suggestions to improve the app, but can’t think of anything right now 😅. Big thanks to the whole team for creating such an amazing, positive app that keeps me active while having so much fun! Please keep doing what you’re doing 💪🏼💜

developer_response.body:
Hi Liora5786,

Wow! Thank you so much for this amazing review! 😎 We’re thrilled to hear that you’re loving the instructors, music, environments, and especially Mike’s positivity 🙌 Your words really energize our whole team!

Knowing that you look forward to working out every evening (and closing those Apple Watch rings! 💪🏼) is exactly why we created FunFitLand – to make fitness something you can’t wait to jump into.

Thank you for being part of our community! We’d love for you to share your journey on our community page and help spread the word. Keep having fun and crushing those workouts!

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🚀💜🎮

reviews.review_description: I've tried a lot of workout apps on vr and FunFitLand imo is the best one. Supernatural I was not a fan of and the free ones I find limited. There was a review I came across wjere the person was complaining about the music choices and something about the beat not going with when you hit the targets or something like that. Claimes something about listen to a lot of music or whatever. The reality here is all that was a personal opinion of that person. The tracks are good choices and amp you up which os the point of music in workouts, I would knkw about music since I produce it and study it and how it affects the mnd and body. Secondly if you're looking for a track or beat to go with when you hit a target, get Beat Saber, that's great for that and can even be a work out on expert level and up. FunFitLand is a fun workout with motivating coaches that even add warm up and cool down which I find important to any workout. The mix of power hits and regular hits coupled with ducks and sways not only gets you sweating but also keeps heart rate going. Stellar workout app for a nominal sub fee which is less than gym memberships.

developer_response.body:
Hi AltRealityCheck,

Wow! Thank you for such a thoughtful and detailed 5-star review! 🙌 It means a lot to hear this from someone who’s explored other VR fitness apps and even studies music production.

We also really appreciate you sharing your perspective on the music and workout experience. Music in fitness can definitely feel personal, and we’re glad the tracks help amp you up and keep your heart rate going strong. Your support and understanding truly mean a lot to our team.

Thanks again for being part of the FunFitLand family! Feel free to share your workouts on the community page and spread the word. We’re excited to keep sweating with you! 💪🔥🎶

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🚀🏋️‍♂️🎧

reviews.review_description:
Although I'm new in VR, my artist's eye is very demanding when it comes to app quality. FunFitLand amazed me at first sight. First of all – the atmosphere – it's realistic (not cartoonish), constantly varied, and never gets boring. A suggestion for the developers: please add a pause option so we can admire the views. Because while I'm spinning my head around in amazement, something hits me in the face :)
The trainer are very helpful because everything is so visual. My English isn't good enough to understand everything, but being able to see what to do helps a lot. Only the menu is translated into other languages. There are locations and workouts for every taste. In my opinion, the music is perfectly chosen.
After my first workout, I immediately bought a subscription because the app truly makes you want to exercise. And these workouts bring so much joy (and quickly drain my Oculus). I also really appreciate being able to control it without joysticks (during my first workout I was constantly worried I might throw them somewhere)).
The only thing is I haven't been able to adjust the "field width" properly yet, and sometimes (especially in “meditative” practices) the width gof my arms just isn't enough.
If you want to have fun exercising by the sea, in the mountains, on the moon (!), this app is perfect for that.

developer_response.body:
Hi MareVirtuale,

Thank you for this wonderful and thoughtful review!

We really appreciate your suggestions too. A pause option to enjoy the views is a lovely idea, and we’ve noted your feedback about the field width adjustment and arm range, especially during meditative practices. We’re so happy FunFitLand brought you enough joy to subscribe right after your first workout!

We’d love for you to share more of your journey on our community page and spread the word about FunFitLand. 

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🌊🌙💜

reviews.review_description:
I actually joined before the big supernatural is ending adding new songs, I guess I had a hunch what was coming. This is the closest thing I've found to replace it. 
I also tried fitxr. Fitxr has a lot of different content, but the combat feels ... Wrong. I'm not sure exactly what it is. The other modes are decent. I'd probably mix this and that if I wanted, but I'm also enjoying vzfit for the biking. 

I love the environment backgrounds on here. I do see some new ones occasionally and I love the little stories that make it feel like you're on a mission. The flow is pretty fun too and I can feel it. 

I would love to see a few things: Id like a way to see power and if I'm staying consistent. I'd also love to see some more combat style moves added in. 

I hope a lot of the supernatural folks come here and with the added support this one has even more potential than what it currently is. 

Anyway I hope this helps someone else in the same situation! Please never sell out to meta!

developer_response.body:
Hi rynanoes,

Thank you for the thoughtful and insightful review! It's great to hear you're enjoying the mission-style workouts and immersive backgrounds. We put a lot of heart into those. 😊

We really appreciate your suggestions about tracking power and consistency, as well as adding more combat-style moves. Those are great ideas, and we’ll definitely take them into consideration as we continue to evolve. We’d also love to invite you to join our Facebook community where fellow FunFitLanders are sharing tips, workouts, and feedback. Come be part of it!

Thanks again for being part of the journey. Together we’ll keep making FunFitLand even better.

Cheers,
The FunFitLand Crew 💥💚🚀

reviews.review_description: I am one of them who can’t go to the gym some reason, so when I found out about this app my life changed and I feel great. Highly recommended thanks. The only thing I wanted to have on this app YouTube music I wish I could connect my YouTube music account and make my own playlist 😏 and can you add Turkish language aswell thanks

developer_response.body:
Hi Altayyasinemir48,

Thank you so much for the amazing 5-star review! 💪 We’re thrilled to hear that FunFitLand has made such a positive difference in your life and helps you stay active when the gym isn’t an option. That’s exactly why we created it!

We love your idea about connecting YouTube Music to create your own playlists 😏🎶 We’ll definitely share your suggestion with our team. In the meantime, feel free to share your experience on our community page and spread the word to others who might need a fun way to stay fit at home!

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🚀🔥🎧

reviews.review_title: There are a lot of things I would add
reviews.review_description:
I’m a Les Mills bodycombat user. I like that Les Mills makes it easy  to track your workouts historically   , and I like that I can readily see the duration of each workout in Les mills along with time left for each workout. I also like that I can change my profile on my headset and let my daughter use the app to track her own goals and progress. Are there any plans to add these features , especially multiple profiles I’m paying fora membership that can not be shared with my household  family member on our household device . 

As far as quality and quantity of workouts I’mvery much enjoying the wide variety in workouts, intensity ,  music, and all the locations / eye candy !

developer_response.body:
Hi rmargos.2023,

Thank you for the thoughtful review and for sharing such detailed feedback. We’re so glad to hear you’re enjoying the variety of workouts, intensity levels, music, and all the beautiful locations in FunFitLand.

We also really appreciate your suggestions around workout history, workout duration, time-left visibility, and household use. And regarding multiple profiles, we’re happy to share that this feature is already in development and is expected to roll out within the next 1–2 weeks. We know how important it is for family members sharing the same device to be able to track their own goals and progress separately.

Thanks again for being part of FunFitLand. If you’d like to share more ideas, feel free to reach us at hello@funfitland.com. We’d also love for you to share your experience on our community page and help spread the word about FunFitLand.

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🎮💪🌟

reviews.review_description: I’m 61 years young and am enjoying working out.  I am only doing the light 10-15 minutes at the moment but am working my way through.  I keep coming back everyday so that is a plus as I never workout.  The music is boring as I don’t know any of them and wish it had some older songs that I could sing along to but that is a small niggle.  Overall I’m exercising and enjoying it so that is a plus.

developer_response.body:
Hi oldbird.477510,

Thank you so much for your lovely review! We’re thrilled to hear that you’re enjoying the workouts, coming back every day, and building your way up at your own pace. That is a huge win, and we’re so happy FunFitLand is helping make exercise enjoyable for you.

We also appreciate your note about the music. It’s really helpful to hear that you’d enjoy more older songs you can recognize, and we’ll share that feedback with our team as we continue improving the experience.

Thanks again for being part of FunFitLand. We’d love for you to share more of your journey on our community page and help spread the word about FunFitLand!

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🎮💪🎶

Please could you share your discord account? Would like to private chat

reviews.review_description: I love this game! Finally found one that raises my heart rate !

developer_response.body:

Amazing to hear! We’re so glad FunFitLand is getting your heart rate up and making workouts feel like a game. Feel free to share your experience on our community page and spread the word to friends who might enjoy it too.

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 💪🎮🔥

reviews.review_description:
I've been doing VR fitness since Box VR(Now Fit XR)was released on the original PlayStation VR. VR fitness ended up playing a huge part in my losing a little over 200 pounds. But then my hips gave out. I haven't been able to walk, let alone workout for almost 4 years...until recently. I got one of my hips replaced. The other hip is pretty bad, but I can stand, walk and, more importantly, workout again. I'd forgotten just how fun this is. 

   So I've been going through the popular apps. There's a bunch of new players on the field. I like this one the best. I really only do the combat workouts(that may change though), and I especially like the way you simulate the motion of battle ropes. But you wanna know what really sets this apart...for me anyway. The sound. When I hit a  power punch, the sound reverberates throughout the virtual space like you just delivered a superhuman punch. I love it. I do wish the exploding target was a little more flashy in those moments, to match the sound, but that's nitpicking. I really enjoy this. Supernatural gets so frantic. The pacing is much better here and proves you don't have to throw a million punches a minute to work up a great sweat. I'm looking forward to today's workout. Bring it on Coach Mike.

developer_response.body:
Hi GammaSmasher,

Wow! Thank you for sharing such a powerful story. We're beyond honored that FunFitLand is part of your fitness journey, especially after everything you've overcome. Losing over 200 pounds and coming back stronger after hip surgery is nothing short of inspiring. Welcome back to the grind—you’ve got serious warrior spirit!

We’re thrilled to hear you're enjoying the combat workouts and those power punch sound effects! That “superhuman” punch feel is exactly what we were going for. And thanks for the suggestion about making the exploding targets flashier. We’ll pass that along to the team.

Keep bringing the heat with Coach Mike! We’re rooting for you all the way!

With respect and energy,
The FunFitLand Crew 🥊🔥💪

reviews.review_description:
I had to update my review. Adding sparky to the workouts is GENIUS! It is so helpful to see that you are indeed doing the movements correctly.
This app just keeps on improving. Keep it up, team. Fun Fit Land is well worth the price, month after month.

Update: Changing my rating up to 5 stars, since the devs acknowledged my concerns. Thank you devs.

developer_response.body:
Hi CURTROCK,

This made our day! Thank you for updating your review and for the 5 stars! 🌟

It means a lot that you noticed the improvements and that our team was able to address your concerns. We’re committed to keeping FunFitLand better month after month.

Thanks for being part of the journey. Feel free to share your progress on the community page and keep rocking those workouts!

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🎮⚡💪

reviews.review_description: Completed my second session and I'm loving the background environments, so appealing.

developer_response.body:
Hi JumboToucan7985,

Congrats on completing your second session! We’re so happy to hear you had fun getting started with FunFitLand.

Feel free to share your experience on our community page and spread the word to anyone who’d enjoy a fun workout.

Best, 
The FunFitLand Crew 💪🎮🌟

reviews.review_description: There’s no place to see your full stats tha I have found. The workouts are fun, sweaty, and different. The orange for the “shields” is hard to see for me at least. I think they need to be a different color or more solid? I would love to be able to turn off warm up and cool downs. And lastly I would love an app for my phone so I can see my stats and possibly make a playlist of workouts for the day.

developer_response.body:
Hi Reebs,

Thank you for your thoughtful feedback and suggestions. We’re so glad you’re enjoying the workouts and finding them fun, sweaty, and varied. We’ve also noted your comments about seeing full stats more easily, improving the visibility of the orange shields, and having the option to skip warm-ups and cool-downs.

We’re also happy to share that a phone app is already in development, with a beta planned for May. It will make it easier to view your stats, and we’d love to welcome you to sign up for beta testing if you’re interested. You can reach us at hello@funfitland.com to join the beta or share more details about the stats and features you’d most like to see.

And if you’re enjoying FunFitLand overall, we’d love for you to share your experience on our community page and spread the word.

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🎮💪✨

reviews.review_description:
I have been boxing with this app every day, at least 30 minutes per day, since last summer. Every week I get new workouts, and even new coaches. I've tried some others, but this one is the most engaging. The targets come fast, requiring focus, agility, and strength. I could not believe it when my wife noticed my biceps (punching air!). After years, I found a way to move that does not feel like a chore.

What could improve? Scores, including measuring the hit strength. Ranking (day, week, month, global) of scores and streaks. Allow lower crouches. Perhaps new types of exercise that include the core (abs, lower abs).

I got so addicted. 
Especially I love Alice!

developer_response.body:
Hi Michalov,

Thank you so much for the amazing 5-star review! We are thrilled to hear that you are enjoying FunFitLand so much.

Your support means a lot to us. We would love to see you share more of your FunFitLand journey on our community page and help spread the word to other VR fitness fans!

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🎮💪🌟

reviews.review_description: I love it, I can't afford every month that much but hopefully you guys brings some discounts like $7 a month or something..
I am impressed, excellent work out, with very beautiful and realistic landscapes 💪😍

developer_response.body:
Hi CyberDjudju55,

Thank you so much for the fantastic 5-star review! We’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying the workout and the beautiful, realistic landscapes. 💪😍

We’d love for you to share your experience on our community page and spread the word about FunFitLand!

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🌟🏞️💪

reviews.review_description:
I'm Japanese and purchased an annual pass.　
The program is great, but I'm not sure if I'm using the correct form. 
Therefore, I think it would be helpful to have Japanese subtitles (and other languages) at least for the tutorial so I can train properly. I'd also really like to know what the coach is saying during training.

developer_response.body:
Hi Yunafura,

The FunFitLand Crew 🎮💪🌍

We hope you’ll stick with us, and if you ever see a special offer that works for you, we’d love to keep you training in FunFitLand. Feel free to share your thoughts anytime on our community page!

There is something for all levels of fitness and having tired other similar movement apps I find this one to be the fastest and most fluid which works for me. 

Personal preference, more electronic sound tracks please, techno, trance, rave just to pick up the 
pace a bit 😀

Hi Mashley1975,

Thank you for the amazing review and for sticking with FunFitLand over the past year! We're so glad to hear it's been a fun and sweaty ride for you, and that the pace and fluidity of the workouts hit the mark.

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🎧🔥🏃‍♂️

reviews.review_title: I really enjoy flowfit alongside combats
reviews.review_description:
I would like to know if any meditational techniques are based on flowfit? I am an avid user. I often find it extremely helpful when I feel anxious. Then I tried flowfit, it works better for me. 

I wonder what makes you design this? What is the reason that drives this some sort of game? Any scientifically proven evidence?

developer_response.body:
Hi Wenyang,

Thank you for such a thoughtful question. We’re really glad FlowFit has been helpful for you. 💜

FlowFit was designed around how the nervous system works. When we feel anxious, the body is often in a “fight or flight” state, where breathing becomes shallow, the body feels tense, and the mind stays alert.

To calm down, the body needs to shift into the opposite state, where breathing slows, movements soften, and the brain receives signals that it’s safe.

FlowFit intentionally combines slow breathing, gentle rhythmic movement, music, and guided imagery to help support that shift. There isn’t one single meditation technique behind it. It’s an integrated approach grounded in well-established principles from neuroscience and psychology about how breath and movement influence the nervous system.

So if it feels like it works especially well for you when you’re anxious, that’s likely your nervous system responding to that reset.

We really appreciate you asking such a meaningful question. 💜

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew

reviews.review_description: I love it. It gets me off the couch on my weightloss journey

developer_response.body:
Hi Vizzysz,

Thank you so much for the 5-star review! We’re thrilled to hear FunFitLand is helping you get off the couch and supporting your weight loss journey.

We’re cheering you on every step of the way! Feel free to share your progress on our community page and spread the word.

Best, 
The FunFitLand Crew 💪🎮✨

reviews.review_title: Proof that more is not always better
reviews.review_description: The two most important factors that make a music rhythm game (or boxing fitness app, however you want to label it) is A) quality of music and B) gameplay (the charting {or timing and moment of appearance} of targets to hit as it relates to the music) - sadly, other (and much more affordable) apps do these two things FAR better than FunFitLand. FunFitLand has a HUMONGOUS library of music, all grouped into playlist routines (for example, the Rock music category alone has over 70 playlists, and on average each contain 3-4 songs). Despite this large library of music, a lot of the music tracks are instrumental, and although the majority of tracks do have vocals in them, MANY of these have lyrics that are generic and uninspired (if AI did not generate this music, then AI must have generated the lyrics, cause the lyrics often feel 'thematically obvious' and sometimes even downright silly). I listen to a lot of music that is produced for the promotions market, so I recognized 3  musical artists who have music featured in FutFitLand: Kat Meoz, Oh The Larceny, and Valley of Wolves, and despite these artists producing music that is worthwhile, the grand majority of FunFitLand users will NOT recognize ANY of the music in this game. The charting of targets to hit is just 'ok'- in other apps I've experienced better timing. Settings allow the user to choose that targets come from one fixed point, and although barriers to dodge and duck can NOT be turned off, they can be set high above the user so that the user does not have to avoid these obstacles (so FunFitLand CAN be played from a sitting position). Here's why I only rate FunFitLand 2 stars: the subscription price to use FunFitLand is expensive, and the Hitstream app offers FAR better music and NOTICEABLY better gameplay, all for a one-time purchase price! The same can be said for the Audio Trip app as it relates to the dance mode versus FunFitLand. Get the FREE Hitstream demo and see for yourself why it is a better alternative

developer_response.body:
Hi RodneyDickson,

Thank you for taking the time to share such a detailed and thoughtful review. We truly appreciate you breaking down what matters most to you. That kind of specific feedback is incredibly valuable to us.

We understand that music preference is deeply personal. Our large and diverse library is designed to support different workout styles and global tastes, but we know it won’t resonate equally with everyone. The same goes for gameplay timing—our team continuously refines charting and mechanics to improve flow, impact, and musical connection. Your comments help guide those improvements.

Regarding pricing, we aim to provide ongoing content updates, new playlists, new worlds, and evolving features through the subscription model. That said, we respect that different pricing structures work better for different users. If you’re ever open to giving us another try, we’d love to hear what specific changes would make the experience a 5-star one for you.

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🎮💪🔥

reviews.review_description:
I never write reviews but I had to for Funfitland! I had heard of how amazing Supernatural was but then dismayed that it was being sunsetted. 

I tried FitXR first and loved the concept but the execution sucked. Cringey music and coaches, bad mechanics with the combat that didn't feel like I connected, and the tracking for the sculpt and dance was atrocious. 

I tried Funfitland next and it felt right! Love the coaches (super genuine, perfect amount of encouragement, and engaging), music is a perfect match for the exercises and scenery, breathtaking scenes, the mechanics are really good and satisfying, and the light exercises are crazy tiring! I most like how forgiving the hit boxes are. The goal isn't perfect movements but to actually just move. I like the option to turn off the streak counter too. I don't care to be perfect with my hits and want to just focus on the workout.

I have just scratched the surface with the 400+ workouts and am loving them! I'm dismayed I have to stop because I'm too tired and I'm needing to make sure to have days off to rest. I just want to workout more! First time I've ever been this into a workout and I feel it's going to be a part of my life for a long time! Excellent job!

reviews.review_title: I actually look forward to working out!
reviews.review_description: For the first time in my life and in my 40's . I leave work excited to come home ,put on my meta quest and work out. I have never enjoyed working out, Im too self conscious for gyms, and tv workouts get boring over time. Each time I enter the worlds and hear the coaches pushing me on in my ear I feel rejuvenated.  I tested all the vr workouts including Supernatural but ended up loving Fun Fit Land the best ! Thanks for helping this old lady get more healthy !

developer_response.body:
Hi Trestrotters,

We're absolutely thrilled to hear that FunFitLand has become your go-to motivation after work! It means the world to us that you’ve found joy, confidence, and consistency in your workouts.

We’d love for you to share your experience with others on our community page to inspire even more folks to jump in and move with us.

With appreciation,
The FunFitLand Crew 💪🌈🎮

reviews.review_description: I definitely found  my workout app, i tried already a few and i had great fun, but with this one i really don't want to stop, awesome music great level of workout and amazing worlds and graphics!!! Way to go!!!!!!

developer_response.body:
Hi Sonokali,

Thank you for the amazing energy! 🌟  Hearing that you don’t want to stop playing (and sweating!) is exactly what we aim for.

We’d love for you to share your favorite world or workout on our community page and help spread the word. Keep having fun and crushing those sessions!

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🚀🎮💪

reviews.review_description: The best fitness app in the world…..Helpful community……

The songs and backgrounds change relatively frequently during each workout, so it's hard to get bored. It offers a rich variety of workout atmospheres and songs, allowing me to choose my favorite workout based on my mood that day. It supports hand tracking, and the option to choose between a 360-degree activity range or just the front view is comfortable. The reason I deducted one star is that it requires a monthly or yearly subscription to use, with no lifetime access option available at present. I believe apps like this truly shine when used consistently over the long term. If a lifetime access option were available at a fair price, I would have definitely given it a 5-star rating.

developer_response.body:
I’m truly grateful for this perspective. To be seen and evaluated with this level of care honestly means a lot to us.

All of our choices so far — including subscriptions — come from a simple hope: that FunFitLand can become a long, lasting journey, something that grows with people over time and continues to bring real delight.

What you shared about long-term commitment, security, and trust really stayed with me. I don’t have a complete answer yet, but I take this seriously and will keep thinking about how we might earn that kind of long-term partnership in the right way as FunFitLand continues to grow and evolve.

— Dr. M, Founder

reviews.review_description:
I cannot wait for the full version.  I've added this to my fitness rotation.
Update- absolutely worth the wait. Just tried flowfit and it's a game changer. I don't like meditations and flowfit was a gamechanger.  While it's not a meditation exactly it is a flowing exercise that felt like meditation with movement.

developer_response.body:
Hi SexyME4U,

Heck yeah!! 🙌🔥 We love that energy! It’s awesome to hear FunFitLand made it into your fitness rotation.

Thanks for sticking with us and for the 5 stars! If you feel like sharing more about your FlowFit experience on the community page, we’d love it, and keep spreading that energy!

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🎮🌊💪

reviews.review_description:
I’ve tried many fitness apps, but FunFitLand is a true gem. The variety of courses is insane—there's always something new to try. The environments are so well-designed that you forget you're sweating in your living room. The passionate atmosphere really pushes you to go that extra mile. Highly recommended!
"

If you’re tired of fitness apps with "cartoony" graphics, you NEED to check out FunFitLand. The character modeling is on another level—the trainers look so lifelike and the movement is incredibly smooth. It actually motivates me to push harder just seeing them stand there!
The variety of interactions is the best part. It’s not just mindless repetition; the game keeps you on your toes with so many different ways to engage and move. The environmental design feels super high-end and polished. The tracking is spot on, and the haptics make every move feel rewarding. Definitely the best-looking and most interactive workout on the Quest right now. Let’s get those gains! 🚀💪

The timing of the targets is poorly designed.  Some objects come in from directions and at a speed that could cause you to punch yourself in the face.  Sometimes you hit the target with the correct hand, and they bounce as though they were hit with the wrong hand.  A lot of times, strikes don't register.  I am going back to another, more technically correct fitness app.  This one is a waste of time.  And another thing: cartoon Mike isn't natural,
 His pep talks and final words of affirmation don't come across as genuine.

developer_response.body:
Hi bryon_smith,

Thank you for taking the time to share such detailed feedback. We’ve received your suggestions, and we truly appreciate you pointing these issues out.

We’re committed to continuously improving FunFitLand. While we’re sorry to hear it wasn’t the right fit for you right now, we hope future improvements may change that.

All the best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🛠️🎮💬

reviews.review_description: I recently started using FunFitLand and as the days go by, I like it more and more.  It’s fun and you really get a good workout.  I work from home, there is no one here but me, it’s quiet and kind of boring, so at lunch time , I put on my headset and go to work (in a fun way).  I enjoy it, I’m in a better mood when I’m done.  I’m getting better with the color coordination as well.  I’m looking forward to working my way to the more difficult  work outs, I’m  not there yet  but I know it will be fun getting there.

developer_response.body:

Thank you for the lovely review! We're so glad to hear that FunFitLand has added some fun and energy to your work-from-home routine.

Keep rocking the workouts and enjoy the journey. You're doing great, and we’re cheering you on every step of the way!

All the best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🎮💪✨

Really appreciate the introduction of flow fit, and seated exercise and hope this expands as I can even do exercise on days I'm not feeling the greatest for mobility. Love that you can choose different levels and length of time and like the two instructors. I like the music and would rather pay for quality workouts than chart hits that I might not like, as long as the music suits the workout I'm okay as ultimately it's the workout choice and environments that keeps me engaged and hope they keep expanding these
.

The FunFitLand Crew 🎧💚🏞️

reviews.review_description:
I’m a 50 year old guy who uses VR for exercise and sim racing. Before discovering FunFitLand, I began my workouts with Super Natural before sliding into a combination of Beat Saber, Audio Trip, Synth Riders, Knockout League (Reflex Alley), and Pistol Whip. 

This app replaces Super Natural for me. The environments are more vibrant and animated. I like coach Mike - he makes me laugh sometimes. There are more movements (high punches, hammer punches, elbows). 

I tried one dancing workout and enjoyed it and may mix that in occasionally. 

There’s a free trial so if you’re into VR exercise, give this a shot.

developer_response.body:
Hey Luv2Float!

Thank you so much for the incredible review! 🧡 We’re honored to be your new go-to fitness app, and we love hearing that FunFitLand fits so well into your workout rotation! Mike will be thrilled to hear he made you laugh 😄

Can’t wait for you to explore more of the DanceFit workouts too. They’re surprisingly addictive! Thanks again for sharing your story and happy sweating! 💪

— The FunFitLand Crew

reviews.review_description: liking the mix of movements and really enjoying the variety  . look forward to progressing more so that i can do battle rope which right now is borderline hard for me. can i have goals!

developer_response.body:
Hi CrystlWtch,

We love hearing that you’re having a blast! 🎉

As for goals… we hear you! 👀 Setting clear goals is a great motivator, and we’re always working on ways to make progression even more rewarding. In the meantime, try setting mini-milestones (like completing Battle Rope without pauses or increasing intensity week by week). You’re closer than you think!

Keep going! We can’t wait to see you conquer Battle Rope! Share your progress on the community page and inspire others along the way.

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🚀🎮💥

reviews.review_description: Love it

Well I just started supernatural on a monthly basis and found out the program was being put in standby mode with no more updates which really made me mad. 
Now I noticed this program and it's a lot like supernatural except the music is different but it works.
So now I have to give the trial a go and see what it offers. It's a little more money but at least it has a chance to grow.

So I got 7 days to see which one I will keep.

After trying the workout a second time I actually liked the variety of moves.

developer_response.body:
Hi toolman907,

Thanks so much for giving FunFitLand a shot! It’s awesome to hear that you’re already enjoying the variety of moves after your second workout. That’s just the beginning!

We’re growing fast and always adding new content, so we hope FunFitLand earns a permanent spot in your fitness routine. Feel free to share your experience on our community page. We’d love to hear how your trial goes!

Cheers,
The FunFitLand Crew 🥊🎧🌟

reviews.review_description:
This is so much better than going to the gym.  You can work out in your pjs if you like.  It has 3 levels (easy, medium, intense) as well as 3 modes (boxing, dance fit, flow fit)  The music is great, the coaches keep you motivated and you can push yourself with the score tracker.  This not only involves your arms but legs as well as you have to duck and weave.  My whole family loves it.  If your not sure (it is a monthly fee, but cheaper than a gym membership) you can try it free for a week.  Give it a shot.  
If the producers read these, it would be nice if we can add notes to our favorite workouts.  For example I have 30 in my favorites but there are 5 that I really like and I can remember which ones they are, or I'd like to add that a certain workout has lots of high punches.  Please add a spot for us to make comments on workouts.

developer_response.body:
Hi Basebalboy67,

Thank you so much for the glowing review! We love hearing how FunFitLand has become a fun and effective workout solution for you and your whole family!

Your suggestion about adding notes to favorite workouts is a fantastic idea. Thank you for sharing it! We’ll definitely pass that along to our development team. Being able to mark workouts with personal comments or highlights sounds like a great way to customize the experience even more.

Feel free to share your journey on our community page and help spread the FunFitLand love!

Cheers,
The FunFitLand Crew 🎮💪🌟

reviews.review_description:
​The interaction design in this game is so clever. It blends fitness moves with fun, diverse mechanics so it never feels like a chore. The realistic modeling and environments provide an incredible sense of immersion.
​Compared to other "basic" fitness apps, the polish and interactive depth here are on another level. If you want an effective workout that’s actually visually stunning and fun to play, this is a must-have for your Quest!

Wow! Thank you for the glowing review! Blending fitness with fun is what we’re all about, so your feedback truly means a lot to us.

All the best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🎮🔥💪

reviews.review_title: The first fitness app that actually kee
reviews.review_description:
​I have to give it up for the character modeling in this game—it’s incredibly lifelike. Having a trainer that looks this realistic standing right in front of you provides a level of immersion you just can't get from 2D videos.
​The variety of interactions is also insane! It’s not just mindless punching; the movements are so well-designed and fun that you get a full-body workout without even realizing it. This is exactly what VR fitness should be—interactive, engaging, and zero boredom. My new favorite way to sweat! 🔥💪

developer_response.body:
Hi dokidoki.2026,

Thank you so much for the amazing review! We're thrilled to hear that you're enjoying the experience!

Your excitement totally fuels us! Keep up the awesome work, and don’t forget to share your favorite workouts and moments with the FunFitLand community. Let’s keep sweating the fun way!

All the best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🎮💪🔥

It totally changes how I perceive fitness—working out has never been this visually pleasing and chill!

After just a few dozen minutes of play, it feels like I've been jogging for just as long—absolutely exhausting. But the thought of burning calories keeps me going without a hint of fatigue.

reviews.review_description: To some people its probably what they need but for me when the lady at the start did a tutorial she was just way too energetic it just threw me off. Some people need that hype but the hype just became overpowering for me. So far im liking the FitXR app. A lot more to offer and doesent overhype as much.

Hi Hisblood77,

Thanks for giving FunFitLand a try and for sharing your honest feedback. We totally understand that everyone has different preferences when it comes to coaching styles. Your input helps us continue to improve and create more balanced options for all.

If you ever decide to give FunFitLand another shot, we’d love to welcome you back with more coach variety in future updates.

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🧘‍♂️🎮🌟

reviews.review_description:
Despite some very tiny flaws, this app is the best for Meta Quest I've seen so far. I'm addicted to doing my workouts nearly every day. I read that there are 300+ courses available, and I'm sure that this is only true for the current moment. It feels like they add new courses every day or two. The way they make you move is very well thought out. The graphics are so nice and detailed. They make you feel like you are in them. Our available space at home for doing such workouts is not the best, but up to now, I haven't broken anything. So I think this app also works well with smaller areas in your home. The personal training analysis and tracking have some space available for improvement, but I'm sure they will improve this part of the app.
The personal trainers, who provide the initial instructions, warm-ups, and cool-downs, are very kind and motivating. I love the way this app motivates me. 
I have to stop writing now because my workout is already waiting.

developer_response.body:
Hi dthuesen,

Thank you for the fantastic review! We're so glad to hear FunFitLand has become a part of your daily routine. It means a lot to know you're hooked in the best way possible!

You're absolutely right. We’re constantly adding new workouts to keep things fresh and exciting. It's great to hear the workouts feel thoughtfully designed and that the visuals help you feel immersed, even in a smaller space. We also appreciate your feedback on the personal training and tracking features. Those improvements are definitely on our radar.

Have a great session today. Coaches are waiting! And don’t forget to share your progress on our community page!

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 💥🧘‍♂️📈

reviews.review_description:
I have other VR games for exercising,  however FFL is such a breath of fresh air. From the sceneries, music and of course coaching style, I really enjoy it all. I prefer combat to groove or flow, but there are some groove options that I keep coming back to and Mike’s new groove workout is fire! Love having Sparky show us the moves. 
So I highly recommend this game/workout program. Both Mike and Dasha do an awesome job and of course so does the team behind the scenes.

developer_response.body:
Hi lex.preyes.9,

Thank you so much for the glowing review!

It’s awesome to know you’re loving the combat workouts, but still finding some groove sessions (especially Coach Mike’s new one!) that keep you coming back. And yes—Sparky always brings the energy! We’ll definitely share your kind words with Mike, Dasha, and the whole team.

Thanks for the recommendation. Keep crushing those workouts, and feel free to share your favorites on the community page!

All the best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🥋🎶🐾

reviews.review_title: Satisfying impact! Looking forward to be
reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this kind of workout game! Boxing in VR feels incredibly satisfying, and the haptic feedback on every hit is spot on—it feels really punchy.I do have one small suggestion for optimization: the motion detection could be a bit stricter. I noticed that sometimes straight punches are registered as successful even when the target calls for a block or an uppercut. Optimizing this to distinguish moves better would make it perfect. Regardless, I see huge potential here and can't wait for future updates!

developer_response.body:
Hi Transmind,

Thanks a ton for the glowing review and detailed feedback! We're so glad you're enjoying the impact and immersive boxing experience. Your enthusiasm means a lot to us. 💥

Great call on the motion detection! Our dev team is always looking to fine-tune gameplay, and your suggestion is super helpful. Stay tuned—more updates and improvements are on the way!

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🥊🚀🎯

reviews.review_description: This game has it all! I love everything I've done so far, especially the meditation and boxing. I tried a beginner cardio one today and wow! I was sweating like crazy...the meditation ones are so relaxing but fun at the same time. I got the free 7 day trial, and when it was time to cancel, they offered a month free to stay so I'm staying with it to see how much more I can get out of it, but I Definitely recommend this!!!

All the best,
The FunFitLand Crew 💪🌟🕶️

Hi FieryFalconi,

Thank you so much for the 5 stars! 🙌 We’re thrilled you’re loving CombatFit and enjoying GrooveFit too. That mix of intensity and rhythm is what we’re all about!

We appreciate you being part of the FunFitLand family. If you ever feel like sharing your favorite workouts on the community page, we’d love to hear more, and thanks for spreading the energy!

reviews.review_description: The game interface is incredibly detailed right from the start. Each section is beautifully designed and informative. I particularly appreciate the calendar function—it's a brilliant tool to help me maintain a daily workout streak. Seeing my progress visually really makes me want to log in every day. I definitely need this kind of structure in my life!

developer_response.body:

reviews.review_title: The energy in this game is infectious!
reviews.review_description: If you struggle with motivation, get this. The vibe is absolutely electric—it feels like a high-end studio class right in your headset. The workout scenes look amazing and really help with immersion. With so many different fitness series to choose from, it keeps the momentum going. I actually look forward to working out now!

developer_response.body:
Hi tedwedwod,

Thank you for the amazing review! We're so glad you're feeling the energy. Our goal is exactly that: to make workouts feel fun, immersive, and motivating. It's awesome to hear that FunFitLand is helping you look forward to fitness!

Don’t forget to share your favorite series or moments on our community page. We’d love to see what’s powering your workouts. And keep spreading the word!

All the best,
The FunFitLand Crew ⚡🎧💪

reviews.review_description: I have been using this app for a month now and i really enjoy the exercise and especially the meditation, it reminds me of tai chi .

reviews.review_title: I tricked my body into exercising.
reviews.review_description: Usually, I hate cardio. But the passionate atmosphere and the cool scenes in this game actually make me want to move. There are so many courses that I can't even use "I'm bored" as an excuse anymore. My sweat is real, but so is the fun.10/10 would sweat buckets again.

reviews.review_title: Worth every penny!!! Best of them all
reviews.review_description: I own a lot of those fitness games but nothing beats this game!!! It's challenging, the portals move constantly around you (if you want), there are squats, side lunges, boxing, blocking, battle ropes and so much more. Every workout is around 3-5 songs (you can choose the genre which is a big thumbs up) and every song you are in another world!!! I own this game since May and I am still surprised by new worlds. The haptic is next level, the feedback on point and the targets on beat. The trainer's voice is encouraging and not over the top . You can also try some dance workouts (not really dancing more cardio) and when you choose "intense" then it is intense. Also with combat. You definitely going to sweat. Les Mills and Fitxr are only warm ups when you train with Funfitland. The subscription is worth every penny and it's the only one I will renew again and again. It's  amazing. Keep up that outstanding work!!!

developer_response.body:
Hey LaughingGuppy3345😊

Wow! Your words made our whole team smile! Thank you so much for this incredible review.

We’re so glad you’re enjoying everything from the portals and squats to the music variety, haptics, and feedback, and that our trainers hit the right balance of motivation 💪🔥. You absolutely captured what we aim for: a truly immersive, fun, and powerful experience.

If you haven’t already, we’d love to welcome you into our FunFitLander community on Facebook! 💬🎉 It’s where fellow players share tips, wins, and motivation—and we'd love to have you there. Join us here: https://www.facebook.com/share/g/1JLSYjdKSc/

We’ll keep doing our best to surprise and challenge you with every update. Thanks for being on this journey with us!

-- The FunFitLand Crew 💃💪

reviews.review_description: Tons of courses to choose from and the environments look great. The atmosphere is super energetic and keeps you motivated. Best way to sweat in VR.

I love the variety of workouts, not only in style, but in intensity. Whether I’m looking for a lazy walk after dinner, and intense boxing match, or a gentle stretching meditation. FunFitLand is the place.

developer_response.body:
Hi SauerkrautSprout,

Thank you for the fantastic review! We're so glad you're loving the variety. It’s awesome to hear FunFitLand fits whatever mood you’re in!

Keep exploring and feel free to share your favorite sessions with the community. We’d love to hear more!

All the best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🥊🌅🧘‍♂️

reviews.review_description: This is hands down one of the most satisfying VR fitness experiences I've had. The "sense of impact" is incredible—whether it's landing a crisp punch in CombatFit or smoothly flowing through a dance sequence, the feedback through the controllers (and even better with hand tracking!) feels responsive and weighty. The developers nailed the "sweet spot" feedback that makes actions like hitting a target on beat so deeply satisfying and, frankly, addictive. Pair that with the exquisite, vibrant, and refreshing background graphics that transport you to another world, and you have a winner. It's not just about following patterns; it's about the comfortable, rhythmic flow you get into, where movement and music become one. I absolutely love this game for what it is: a fantastically designed, fun, and physically rewarding experience that I keep coming back to.

developer_response.body:
Hi Ezra7983,

Thank you for the amazing review! We're so glad to hear that FunFitLand delivered one of your most satisfying VR fitness experiences. It means the world to us.

We’re especially happy you’re enjoying the impact feedback and rhythm in both CombatFit and GrooveFit sequences. That “sweet spot” feeling you described is exactly what we aim for, and it’s awesome to know it’s keeping you coming back. Hand tracking love noted too!

Keep grooving, punching, and flowing, and don’t forget to share your journey on our community page!

Best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🥊🎵🌈

reviews.review_description: If you enjoyed Fitness Boxing on Switch, you are going to love this. It captures that satisfying rhythm-based workout perfectly but adds so much more style. The music is fantastic, the weekly updates keep it fresh, and the blend of dance and combat flows really well. True to its name, it's genuinely "Fun" and gets you "Fit." I love this game because it actually motivates me to get up and move every day!

All the best,
The FunFitLand Crew 🎵🥊💃

reviews.review_title: The perfect collection of sports games
reviews.review_description: Oh, this is perfect. A fantastic sports game with boxing, cool-down exercises, and more. You can immerse yourself in nature or even in outer space. The movement rhythm is great, and the controller provides vibration feedback, perfectly complementing the dynamic music. It's amazing!
